name: p0-baseline

llm_call_estimates_from_live_observation._note: Worker logs lost on restart; numbers below are from real-time tailing during the run.

tokens._note: Pre-OPT-001 binary did not emit token metrics. After OPT-001 lands, capture into baseline-post-p0.json.

notes: Baseline reflects high-retranslation behavior: 3 of 5 segments hit thinking-model fallback.
Worker /metrics endpoint did NOT exist in this binary; OPT-001 adds :8081/metrics.
test_60s.mp4 was previously translated quickly (job 83 = 42.8s); the slow run here is consistent with kimi-k2.5 latency variability when retranslation loops engage.
Drift p95 = 0.097 is the segment 1 outlier ("borrowing from gap" was not chosen); lower-bound for OPT-001 / OPT-002 to compare against.

OPT-001._note: After OPT-001, baseline-post-opt001.json must show cached_tokens / input_tokens >= 0.4 and translate stage not slower than 5%.

OPT-003._note: Tool-call path must produce >= 0 valid suggestions and 0 strict-parse failures.

OPT-002._note: Observe-only mode: every segment should receive a judge score; verdict logged but not acted upon.
